paragraphs: For Toekomstboeren, I designed and illustrated their zine about the intersections of queerness and farming.

I designed and illustrated this book of speculative fictions as a supplement to the paper [Once Upon a Time](https://dl.acm.org/doi/10.1145/3706599.3716223) When HCI Prioritised Environmental Sustainability: Reflections on a Collection of Fictions.
For the Radboud Welcomes Newcomers project, I designed and illustrated their 2024 report.
Series of illustrations for the podcast Excellence in Context, which explores the question of what excellence means to people in academia.
For the Radboud DEI Office, I created a Word template and illustrations for their guide for trans, nonbinary and intersex students.
I designed this logo for clothing items created by Mignot, heavily inspired by the branding of Lucy & Yak, but with the whimsical touch of a worm.
For the interdisciplinary course Innovating by Design, I developed a visual identity that makes the design thinking process more accessible to students.
I developed the visual identity of University Rebellion, and created various posters, icons and other graphics for the Dutch climate and social justice movement.

UNID is a design magazine created by students of Industrial Design at the TU/e and as a member of the graphics team, I designed and illustrated various articles. In my second year, I became the magazine's Chief of Graphics, redesigning the magazine's layout and logo and developing a unique style for each issue.
